title: Riftup
description: A simple mod adding a new step and other smaller tweaks to progression
body:
# Riftup
A mod that slightly alters the game progression.
## Features
### Cloth Armor
Cloth armor is crafted from wool. It offers less protection than leather armor, but is cheaper.
Like leather armor, it is also dyeable.
### Steel
Steel is a new equipment tier between iron and diamond. It is obtained by smelting an Iron Ingot using Coke as a fuel. [Coke](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Coke_(fuel)) is a new fuel source, obtained by smelting Coal. Steel can be used to craft armor and tools. It aims to serve as a diamond replacement for players who did not enter the nether yet , with diamonds being rarer in the mod.
### Nether diamond ore
In Riftup, diamonds only generate in the Nether dimension. They are distributed between y=100 and y=128. This makes diamond rarer and harder to access, but easier to mine as netherrack is broken faster.
